market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is cautious with rising VIX mentions and mixed futures chatter. Pre-market shows slight downside pressure on tech amid 10Y yield at 4.57%. No major events flagged but options flow indicates defensive positioning.

predictions.reasoning: VIX up 20% signals volatility; X posts highlight yield concerns pressuring indices. Futures point to mild open weakness.
Tech-heavy QQQ lagging 5-day; X flow shows NVDA/MSFT profit-taking chatter ahead of any earnings.
Crypto stability and AI narrative persist on X despite broader caution; short-term bounce likely.
